title: Nadir
description: Nadir Matringe is a Visiting Professor of Mathematics at NYU Shanghai. He is currently on leave from Université Paris-Cité, France, where he was appointed Full Professor of Mathematics in December 2021. Before he was Associate Professor in Université de Poitiers, France. He obtained his PhD in 2008
